arts.ttl: How Man United could line up against Newcastle without Manuel Ugarte and Bruno Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Newcastle United on Monday but they will be without Bruno Fernandes and Manuel Ugarte

arts.ttl: Agent welcomes player’s exit from Manchester United – Red Devils cooperation needed for January move
arts.sum: Real Betis are considering signing Manchester United’s Antony on a loan deal in the winter market. That’s according to ABC Sevilla, who state the La Liga side are looking at the winger to improve their attack. arts.ttl: 'I saw the Man Utd dressing room hierarchy among players with my own eyes'
arts.sum: A lack of leadership in the Manchester United dressing room has hurt Ruben Amorim's start at the club - but one Old Trafford icon recounted how it can lead to players getting special treatment

arts.ttl: Six Man Utd players free to talk to overseas clubs on January 1 as Ruben Amorim faces headache
arts.sum: Manchester United have six players who will be free to talk to non-English clubs next month and the Red Devils will need to make some big decisions about their futures

arts.ttl: Man Utd flop Antony offered January ESCAPE ROUTE
arts.sum: Real Betis could launch another attempt at loaning Manchester United flop Antony in January, according to Spanish media. Man Utd flop Antony offered January ESCAPE ROUTE

arts.ttl: 'Unsellable' Man Utd duo earning similar money to Tom Heaton as 'issues' arise
arts.sum: Manchester United are facing further problems behind the scenes, with the club said to be struggling to pay two talented stars enough money despite reserve goalkeeper Tom Heaton's hefty contract

arts.ttl: “Of course, I like” – Player pleased with Manchester United links for January transfer
arts.sum: Real Sociedad’s Luka Sučić is aware of the reports linking him with a move to Manchester United. The Croatia international took advantage of the winter break and made a trip to Bosnia and Herzegovina. Sportske Novosti had a chat with the 22-year-old on a few topics, including the recent reports linking him to Manchester United. arts.ttl: Manchester United prodigy Chido Obi-Martin pushing for senior Red Devils debut?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly planning when to hand teenage prodigy Chido Obi-Martin his senior debut for the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah overtakes Man Utd icon with landmark Liverpool assist
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah scored and set up two goals in Liverpool's 5-0 thrashing of West Ham on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'Seriously Interested' in Signing 'Extraordinary' Barcelona Star
arts.sum: Manchester United are showing ‘serious interest’ in Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen ahead of the January transfer window.
